title: Cornmeal Crisps with Pickles
description: These kid-friendly cornmeal crisps are a perfect side dish or snack, featuring tangy pickles for added flavor.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together the cornmeal and salt.
Add the pickles to the mixture and stir until evenly coated.
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Spread the cornmeal-pickle mixture out in an even layer on the prepared pan.
Bake at 250°F for about 1 hour, or until crisp (check periodically).
Serve warm as a snack or side dish.
